title: SimpleSetSpawn
description:
[1.8-1.19]
SetSpawn and Spawn plugin for 1.8 to Latest Minecraft servers
body:
SetSpawn and Spawn plugin for 1.8 to Latest Minecraft servers


## Features
- Set Spawn command
- Spawn command
- First join teleport to Spawn (true/false in config)
- On join teleport to spawn (true/false in config)


## Setup
- Download the plugin jar and drop it on your server /plugins/ folder.
- Restart your server and configurate the plugin

## Config FIles

>Config File [here](https://github.com/Stars-Development/SimpleSetSpawn/blob/main/src/main/resources/config.yml)

>Spawns File [here](https://github.com/Stars-Development/SimpleSetSpawn/blob/main/src/main/resources/spawns.yml)
